description: Schema for extracting loan details from a document.

name.description: The name of the loan or lender
name.title: Name

principal.description: The original principal amount of the loan
principal.title: Principal

interest_rate.description: The annual interest rate as a percentage (e.g., 12.0)
interest_rate.title: Interest Rate

installment_amount.description: The monthly or per-period installment amount
installment_amount.title: Installment Amount

duration_months.description: The total duration of the loan in months
duration_months.title: Duration Months

start_date.description: The start date of the loan in YYYY-MM-DD format
start_date.title: Start Date

currency.description: The ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., PHP, USD, SGD)
currency.title: Currency

lender.description: The name of the lending institution
lender.title: Lender

reasoning.description: Brief explanation of the extraction results
reasoning.title: Reasoning

title: LoanExtractionSchema
